mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 1
mnemonics.content: Mean is the AVERAGE Joe, Variance is how VARIED his wardrobe is.

mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 2
mnemonics.content: Mean: Middle of the road, Variance: Volume of deviation from the road.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: The mean (μ) is the expected value or average of a probability distribution.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: Variance (σ²) measures the spread or dispersion of the distribution around the mean.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: Standard deviation (σ) is the square root of variance, representing the average distance from the mean.
